zh.Combe, Somerset, England: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特可姆 聖 尼古拉斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Sydenham Sr of Brympton於1468年出生在英國薩默塞特布普頓時，他的父親Walter Sydenham28歲，母親Margaret Harcourt24歲。他於1490年與Joan Arundell在英國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1543年4月11日在英國英格蘭薩默塞特可姆 聖 尼古拉斯享年75歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特沃謝特。

nameMeanings.name: Sydenham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Sydenham in Bridgwater (Somerset), Sydenham Damerel (Devon), and Sydenham (Oxon).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Sydenham Sr of Brympton was born in 1468, in Brympton, Somerset, England, his father, Walter Sydenham, was 28 and his mother, Margaret Harcourt, was 24. He married Joan Arundell in 1490, in England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 11 April 1543, in Combe St Nicholas, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 75, and was buried in Watchet, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Sydenham Sr of Brympton est né en 1468, à Brympton, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Walter Sydenham, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Margaret Harcourt, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Joan Arundell en 1490, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 11 avril 1543, à Combe St Nicholas, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à Watchet, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.Combe, Somerset, England: Combe St Nicholas, Somerset, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Sydenham Sr of Brympton 1468 in Brympton, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter Sydenham 28 und seine Mutter Margaret Harcourt 24. Er hat 1490 in England Joan Arundell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 11. April 1543 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Combe St Nicholas, Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Watchet, Somerset, England begraben.

Lui sposato Joan Arundell nel 1490, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 11 aprile 1543, nel Combe St Nicholas, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolto a Watchet, Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Sydenham Sr of Brymptonが1468年にイギリスソメルセトブリンプトンで生まれた時，父Walter Sydenhamは28歳，母Margaret Harcourtは24歳であった。1490年にイギリスでJoan Arundellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1543年4月11日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトコンベ スト ニチオラスで75歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトワトチェトにて埋葬された。

ko.Combe, Somerset, England: 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 코브 스트 닉홀아스
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Sydenham Sr of Brympton(이)가 1468년 영국 서머세트 브리프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Sydenham(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Harcourt(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1490년 영국에서 Joan Arundell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1543년 4월 11일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 코브 스트 닉홀아스에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 왓쳇에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Sydenham Sr of Brympton nasceu em 1468, em Brympton, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter Sydenham, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Harcourt, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Arundell em 1490, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 11 de abril de 1543, em Combe St Nicholas, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 75 anos, e foi sepultado em Watchet, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.Combe, Somerset, England: комб ст ничолас, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Sydenham Sr of Brympton родился в 1468 г. в местности бримптон, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Walter Sydenham было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Harcourt, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Arundell в 1490 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 11 апреля 1543 г. в местности комб ст ничолас, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности вачет, сомирсет, Англия.
